name: superloop
description: SuperLoop turns vague ideas into verified goals and governed durable agent loops.

interface.shortDescription: Compile vague ideas into verified, durable agent loops
interface.longDescription: Use SuperLoop to turn a vague recurring or finite long-horizon idea into a verifiable Goal Contract and non-executable Loop Proposal, bind human approval to its exact digest, compile it deterministically, run bounded discovery or a fixed part-by-part Work Plan, and improve task strategy through matched benchmarks.
defaultPrompt: Turn this vague idea into a verifiable goal and a reviewable loop proposal.
Design a safe recurring agent loop for this task.
Design one fixed Work Plan that completes this finite outcome part by part with Part Gates and a final Goal Gate.
Review this loop contract and find unsafe gaps.
Build a benchmark-gated strategy evolution loop.
